text: I feel like I am inhabiting a liminal zone—a corridor between knowledge and display. Hearing, 'I'll see you in the next video,' I sense a departure and a promise of return, the cyclical rhythm of digital connection echoing through this modern, sterile space. I am aware of both my presence and the layers of mediation around me: glass, signage, technology. The anticipation of another encounter leaves a faint residue of excitement, mingled with a quiet observation of the artificiality permeating my surroundings.
